name: breadcrumb
title: Breadcrumb
description: Fluent 2-styled breadcrumb with shadcn APIs. Seven composable parts (Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator, BreadcrumbEllipsis), inline SVG chevron/ellipsis glyphs to stay a Server Component.
author: graundtech <https://github.com/graundtech/fluent2-react-kit>
